seoTitle: Cundletown vs Cunjurong Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cundletown and Cunjurong Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cundletown vs Cunjurong Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cundletown and Cunjurong Point.
heading: Cundletown vs Cunjurong Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cundletown, New South Wales and Cunjurong Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cunjurong Point has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cundletown (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cundletown or Cunjurong Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cundletown has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Cunjurong Point scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cundletown scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Cunjurong Point scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cundletown or Cunjurong Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cunjurong Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
